Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.vintage" AS vintage, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND bs."in.vintage" = '1980 to 1989' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/bb9c67cb57b392c2a9ce5bbb2c21806b45da3bdccf29ab5e682bbe821859b387/9f9209bd-82a6-45ba-84f3-6e755877f701/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
